title: 4 BHK Flat in Sector 134, Noida
description:
Jaypee greens kosmos in sector 134, noida is a ready-To-Move housing society. It offers apartments in varied budget range. These units are a perfect combination of comfort and style, specifically designed to suit your requirements and conveniences. There are 1bhk, 2bhk, 3bhk and 4bhk apartments available in this project. This housing society is now ready to be called home as families have started moving in. Check out some of the features of jaypee greens kosmos housing society:

*jaypee greens kosmos sector 134 has 52 towers, with 18 floors each and 7000 units on offer.

*spread over an area of 45.08 acres, jaypee greens kosmos sector 134, noida is one of the spacious housing societies in the noida region. With all the basic amenities available, jaypee greens kosmos fits into your budget and your lifestyle.

*sector 134, noida has good connectivity to some of the important areas in the proximity such as gulshan one29, somerville international school and stellar 135 and so on.

Jaypee greens kosmos price list

If you are looking for ready to move projects, jaypee greens kosmos is a right choice for you. Here, a 1bhk apartment is available at a starting price of rs. 79.2 l while a 2bhk apartment is offered at rs. 75 l onwards. For a 3bhk apartment at jaypee greens kosmos, you will need to spend at least rs. 97.75 l those who are looking for investment opportunities in jaypee greens kosmos may find it worthy from a long-Term perspective to earn rental income.
